name: Jakiro
description: Two sides of the same coin. Jakiro, the Twin Head Dragon Even among magical beasts, a twin-headed dragon is a freak. Equal parts ice and fire, cunning and rage, the creature known as Jakiro glides over charred and ice-bound battlefields, laying waste to any who would bear arms against it. Pyrexae dragon clutches always contain two fledglings. Famous for their viciousness even from the first moments of life, newly hatched dragons of this species will try to kill their sibling while still in the nest. Only the strongest survive. In this way is the strength of the Pyrexae line ensured. By some accident of nature, the freak Jakiro hatches from a single egg, combining in a single individual the full range of abilities found within the diverse Pyrexae species. Trapped within the armature of its monstrous body, the powers of ice and fire combine, and now no enemy is safe.

abilities.name: Double Trouble
abilities.description: Jakiro's attack launches two projectiles at the target, but deals less damage. The Ice Head always attacks first. The Fire Head applies an instant attack after the Ice Head's attack at a fixed interval. This attack ignores the melee heroes' damage block innate ability.

abilities.name: Dual Breath
abilities.description: An icy blast followed by a wave of fire launches out in a path in front of Jakiro. The ice head applies an attack speed slow and a movement speed slow to affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Ice Path
abilities.description: Creates a path of ice that stuns and damages enemy units that touch it.

abilities.name: Macropyre
abilities.description: Exhales a wide line of lasting flames, which deals damage per second to any enemy units caught in the fire. Emits two ice walls along the edges of Macropyre that slow any enemy units trying to cross them.
